---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new check, improvement, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What limitation are you hitting?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible — e.g., which file/path/property would a new native check inspect?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or other context that would help evaluate this request.
